dataset.description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

columns.description: The name of the player, uniquely identifying each row.

columns.description: The role of the player in the team, which is 'Batter' for all entries in this table.
columns.name: role

columns.description: Total number of runs scored by the player.
columns.name: total_runs

columns.description: The strike rate of the batter, calculated as runs scored per 100 balls faced.
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Total number of balls faced by the player in their career.
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Total number of wickets taken by the player.
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Total number of runs conceded by the player when bowling.
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Total number of overs bowled by the player.
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.name: total_matches_played

desc: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).
goal: Study the impact of different venues on match outcomes, analyzing the win rates for home and away teams and their relationship with individual player performances.
name: Visual Analytics System cricket_goal2_1742641716

plan.path: The user browses View 1 at the [Overview] level and learns about the overall win rates for home and away teams across venues. Next, the user selects specific venues of interest in View 1, and this interaction filters data in Views 2 and 3. In View 2 at the [Exploration] level, the user analyzes individual player performances as aggregated by venue. Concurrently, in View 3, the user explores win rate trends by venue and team type at the [Exploration] level using a heatmap. The user drills further down into individual player performance distributions in View 4 and investigates seasonal trends in match frequency at venues in View 5 at the [Detail] level.

effect.description: Allows selecting a subset of venues by brushing, filtering data for subsequent views.

visualization.description: A grouped bar chart showing win rates at each venue for home and away teams. Each venue is on the x-axis, win rate on the y-axis, and team type (home or away) is indicated by color.

effect.description: Show tooltip with player performance details (runs, wickets, strike rate).

visualization.description: A scatter plot where each point represents a venue, x-axis shows venue names, y-axis shows a generic performance metric, size encodes runs scored, and color encodes wickets taken.

effect.description: Show detailed win rate statistics for the selected venue and team type.

visualization.description: A heatmap representing win rates for home and away teams, with venues on the x-axis, team type on the y-axis, and win rates encoded as color intensity.

effect.description: Show a tooltip with median, quartiles, and outlier information for the selected metric.

visualization.description: A set of box plots for each venue displaying distributions of runs scored, wickets taken, and strike rates across players.

views.components: A slider to dynamically filter seasons and update the visualization.

effect.description: Filter the view by season range selected by the slider.

visualization.description: An area chart displaying the trend of total matches played at specific venues over seasons.

data.reason: The 'venue' is central to studying the impact of match locations on outcomes, as win rates can provide insight into home or away team advantages.
data.requirement: Highlight the 'venue' column from the 'match_summary' table as the key entity for analysis. Aggregate matches based on venues to calculate the overall win rates for teams.

data.reason: Match outcomes, results (better the understanding of win), and the respective teams help in contrasting the performance of home versus away teams, which is a core part of the analysis goal.
data.requirement: Extract 'match_outcome', 'result', and 'team' from the 'match_summary' table to compute win rates categorized by home and away teams.

data.reason: Correlating individual player performances with venue-specific data provides insights into how venues impact player contributions to match outcomes.
data.requirement: Link player-specific data from the 'player_data_stats' table with match venues using the 'match_id' column. Summarize individual player performances (e.g., runs, wickets, strike rates) at different venues.

data.reason: Identifying home and away teams is essential for computing and contrasting their win rates.
data.requirement: Integrate team information from the 'match_results' and 'player_data_stats' tables to distinguish home and away teams based on the match venue location.

data.reason: Incorporating career-level stats provides context when comparing venue-based player performances and team successes.
data.requirement: Retrieve 'total_runs', 'total_wickets_taken', and other key performance metrics for players from 'batter_player_stats' and 'bowler_player_stats' tables to aggregate their contribution at venue levels.

data.reason: Analyzing the changes in home and away advantages over time can identify long-term patterns influenced by venues.
data.requirement: Filter match-level data using time periods (from 'season' column in 'match_summary') to enable trend studies across different years.

interaction.reason: Allows users to zoom into specific venues to analyze their individual impact on match outcomes and performance metrics.
interaction.requirement: Enable filtering by venue using dropdown menus for detailed views of specific locations.

interaction.reason: Facilitates direct comparison between the performance of home and away teams at each venue.
interaction.requirement: Include a toggle switch to compare home and away team win rates side by side.

interaction.reason: Supports exploratory analysis by enabling users to focus on specific venues or clusters of points.
interaction.requirement: Allow dynamic brushing on scatter plots to select venues and update other linked views (e.g., heat map or bar chart).

interaction.reason: Provides detailed, on-demand information for precise analysis without cluttering the visual interface.
interaction.requirement: Implement tooltips on graphs to display additional metadata, such as team names, seasons, or detailed individual player stats on hover.

interaction.reason: This ensures users can examine both aggregated (venue-level) and detailed (player/match-level) insights fluidly.
interaction.requirement: Support drill-down interaction on bar charts, allowing users to break down venue-level stats into individual player contributions or match details.

interaction.reason: Allows temporal analysis and understanding of changes in venue performance trends over different periods.
interaction.requirement: Add a slider to filter the timeline by seasons or years in all visualizations.

visualization.reason: Bar charts are effective in comparing categorical data like venues and distinguishing between home and away teams.
visualization.requirement: Use a bar chart to show win rates at different venues, separating home and away teams' performance metrics.

visualization.reason: Scatter plots with additional encodings help in visualizing correlations and anomalies in performance metrics across venues.
visualization.requirement: Create a scatter plot where each point represents a venue, with metrics like total runs scored, wickets taken, and win rates encoded as bubble size or colors.

visualization.reason: A heat map effectively conveys patterns of performance over time or across combinations of factors like venue and team.
visualization.requirement: Design a heat map displaying win rates of teams (home and away) at specific venues and seasons.

visualization.reason: Box plots provide insights into variance and anomalies in players' performances at the venue level.
visualization.requirement: Create a box plot summarizing the distribution of individual player performance metrics (e.g., runs, wickets) for different venues.

visualization.reason: Area charts highlight temporal trends and are suitable for representing cumulative or quantity data across time intervals.
visualization.requirement: Utilize an area chart to show the trend of total matches played over different seasons at specific venues.

visualization..requirement: Combine tick charts and bar charts to indicate top-performing players' contributions at specific venues.
visualization.reason: Combining these visualizations helps represent individual player details alongside cumulative team performance statistics.

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1_venue_win_rate AS SELECT venue, team, (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN match_outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(match_id)) AS win_rate FROM match_summary JOIN detailed_player_data ON match_summary.match_id = detailed_player_data.match_id GROUP BY venue, team
sqls.name: view_1_venue_win_rate

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3_team_win_rate AS SELECT venue, team_type, (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN match_outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(match_id)) AS win_rate FROM match_summary JOIN (SELECT match_id, CASE WHEN match_summary.match_type = 'home' THEN 'home' ELSE 'away' END AS team_type FROM match_summary) AS team_info ON match_summary.match_id = team_info.match_id GROUP BY venue, team_type
sqls.name: view_3_team_win_rate

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_5_season_match_count AS SELECT season, venue, COUNT(match_id) AS match_count FROM match_summary GROUP BY season, venue
sqls.name: view_5_season_match_count

tasks.method: Aggregate win rates at each venue using the 'venue', 'match_outcome', and 'outcome_winner' columns from the 'match_summary' table. Visualize win rates using a bar chart (V1) separating home and away teams.
tasks.objective: Understand how each venue influences match outcomes for home and away teams.

tasks.method: Link data from the 'detailed_player_data' table to venues using the 'match_id' column. Create a scatter plot (V2) where each point represents a venue and encodes player performance metrics, such as runs, wickets, and strike rate, with colors and bubble sizes.
tasks.objective: Analyze how individual player performances correlate with match outcomes and win rates at different venues.

tasks.method: Distinguish home and away teams using 'venue' and 'team' information from 'match_summary' and 'detailed_player_data' tables. Use a heat map (V3) to display win rates of home and away teams at venues across seasons.
tasks.objective: Compare home and away team performance trends at specific venues over time.

tasks.method: Summarize individual player performance distributions at venues using box plots (V4). Include tooltips (I4) displaying detailed stats on hover.
tasks.objective: Identify variance and anomalies in player performances across venues.

tasks.method: Analyze the trend of total matches played over seasons at venues using an area chart (V5). Use a slider (I6) to filter seasons dynamically.
tasks.objective: Understand long-term trends of venue-specific match frequency and their potential impacts on win rates.

tasks.method: Aggregate career-level player statistics from 'batter_player_stats' and 'bowler_player_stats' per venue. Use a combination of tick charts and bar charts (V6) to visualize top-performing players' contributions at venues.
tasks.objective: Correlate venue and player-level stats to identify anomalies and standout performances.

tasks.method: Implement filtering functionality (I1) to zoom into specific venues and dynamically update scatter plots (V2) and heat maps (V3). Use clustering to identify venues with similar performance patterns.
tasks.objective: Facilitate detailed analysis of specific venues based on performance patterns and outcomes.

tasks.method: Retrieve metadata for matches played at specific venues and link player-level outcomes. Display this information using drill-down interactions (I5) on bar charts.
tasks.objective: Provide detailed insights into match-level and player-level data for specific venues.
